title: sazanami_light
description:
Sazanami light is modpack.
It includes 190 over mod.
Originally it was created for my friends. You can enjoy tech (centered create and MI), foods (centered farmer's delight), building, magic (several mods include. find magic suits you)
body:
Sazanami Light is a modpack includes 190 over mod.

This is the light version of [sazanami](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sazanami),
and imcompatible with sazanami, but has its essentials, I think.

Originally it was created for my friends.

You can enjoy tech (centered create and MI), foods (centered farmer's delight), building, magic (several mods include. find magic suits you) , and exploring.

It has no quest, and not many config changed from default: there is not many binding other good configured modpack.

So, you can find your fun by yourself and your friends.

Attensions:
- Some mods is disabled as default for performance (Most resourcepacks also are disabled). 
  - They are client only mods and mostly decorative or convenience. So you can enable as you like from profile.

Fun for technology, magic, etc.

Including Mod and resources pack List:
- [Rings of Ascension](https://modrinth.com/mod/rings-of-ascension)
